channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Clara Immerwahr: Pioneering German Chemist and Her Struggle Against Gender and Moral Constraints
item.description: Clara Immerwahr was born in 1870 in Polkendorf, Germany, and became the first woman in Germany to earn a PhD in Chemistry in 1900, overcoming significant institutional barriers. Despite her achievemen...

item.title: BJP Releases Comprehensive Manifesto Ahead of Assam 2026 Assembly Elections
item.description: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has officially unveiled its manifesto for the Assam Assembly elections 2026, presenting a mix of cultural, economic, and governance promises. Released by Finance Minis...

item.title: Persons with disabilities demand reserved legislative seats for inclusive governance
item.description: For one town hall wey News Central TV organise for Asaba, Delta State, persons wey get disabilities don ask the federal and state governments make dem reserve some seats for them inside National and S...

item.title: IEBC Launches Nationwide Drive to Register 2.5 Million New Voters Ahead of 2027 Polls
item.description: The Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEBC) has kicked off a nationwide Enhanced Continuous Voter Registration (ECVR) campaign, targeting 2.5 million new voters across Kenya. The exerci...

item.title: Renault Duster 2026: Comprehensive Review of Design, Features, and Driving Experience
item.description: The Renault Duster makes a notable return to the SUV segment it once helped define, arriving with a more mature design and improved refinement. While retaining its familiar upright and rugged stance, ...

item.title: US President Trump maintains hardline stance on Iran amid peace talks
item.description: US President Donald Trump has reiterated his tough rhetoric towards Iran, even as he acknowledges progress in ongoing peace negotiations with Tehran. While discussions between the US and Iran appear t...

item.title: Authorities advise against swimming while intoxicated during Holy Week
item.description: Interior Secretary Jonvic Remulla reminded the public to avoid swimming while intoxicated during Maundy Thursday and Good Friday, noting that drunkenness is the leading cause of beach fatalities durin...

item.title: Maple Leafs part ways with GM Brad Treliving amid team struggles
item.description: When the Toronto Maple Leafs hired Brad Treliving as general manager in May 2023, fans and analysts were immediately puzzled given his past performance and the departure of Kyle Dubas. Treliving's ten...

item.title: Miss Grand Thailand contestant praised for spontaneous dance during pageant

item.title: Celine Dion to Resume Performing with 10 Shows in Paris This September
item.description: Canadian singer Celine Dion has announced her return to live performances after a long hiatus caused by her diagnosis of Stiff Person Syndrome, a rare autoimmune disorder. In a video message to fans o...

item.title: Reflecting on Sobukwe's Role in Human Rights Day and National Memory
item.description: South Africa’s 2026 Human Rights Day, commemorating 30 years since the adoption of the Constitution, was marked by a keynote address from President Cyril Ramaphosa in Kimberley. The speech highlighted...

item.title: Senior Police Officer Dies in Vehicle at Nyamira Market, Investigation Underway

item.title: Government Urges Calm Following Violence in KuGompo Over Nigerian Traditional Leader
item.description: On Monday, KuGompo, formerly known as East London, witnessed violent protests following the alleged coronation of a Nigerian 'Igbo king'. The demonstration, which began peacefully with a march to deli...

item.title: Australia faces challenges in maintaining its strategic alliance with the US under Trump
item.description: Australia’s strategic alliance with the United States has always been vital, but under President Trump it has become increasingly unpredictable. Historically, global partners have occasionally been jo...

item.title: Government and Stakeholders Engage to Resolve NHI Disputes Amid Legal Challenges
item.description: Health Minister Aaron Motsoaledi recently met with the South African Medical Association (Sama), one of the organisations challenging the National Health Insurance (NHI) Act in court, to discuss commo...

item.title: Plateau community attack kills 27, residents plead for justice
item.description: The tragic attack on Angwan Rukuba community in Jos North, Plateau State, on Sunday night has left 27 people dead. Eyewitnesses said the attackers, dressed in military camouflage and riding motorcycle...

item.title: Brad Treliving dismissed as Maple Leafs general manager after disappointing season

item.title: Nakuru Woman Allegedly Killed by Estranged Lover, Family Searches for Missing Child
item.description: A tragic incident has shaken a family in Nakuru after Jackline Awuor, who worked as a security guard at the Geothermal Development Company, was allegedly murdered by her estranged lover. On the mornin...

item.title: Ishaq Dar visits China to consult on regional peace efforts and US-Iran mediation
item.description: Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar departed from Islamabad on Tuesday for a brief one-day visit to China, aimed at holding in-depth discussions on key regional matters. According to ...

item.title: 17-Year-Old Murang'a Teen Advocates for Gen Z Rights Through Week-Long Tree-Hugging Challenge
item.description: A 17-year-old girl, Cynthia Njeri Mburu, from Kahumbuini village in Murang'a County, has started a 168-hour tree-hugging protest outside the Kiambu County governor’s office. The symbolic act is aimed ...
